⊢ Disjoint (C.edgeSet ∩ M) (C.edgeSet ∩ M')

        have := (Graph.le_def.mp hCG).2 heC
        exact this.2)
    exact this (Or.inl ⟨heM.2, heM'⟩))

classical
  by_contra hD
  have hne : ¬ (E(C) ∩ M ∩ (E(C) ∩ M')).Subsingleton := by
    simpa [Set.disjoint_left] using hD
  rcases not_subsingleton_iff.1 hne with ⟨e, he, f, hf, hnef⟩
  have heM : e ∈ M := he.2.1
  have hfM : f ∈ M := hf.2.1
  have heC : e ∈ E(C) := he.1.1
  have hfC : f ∈ E(C) := hf.1.1
  have heM' : e ∈ M' := he.2.2
  have hfM' : f ∈ M' := hf.2.2
  have hsub : E(C) ⊆ E(hM.restrict₂ hM') := by
    intro e he
    have : e ∈ E(C) := he
    exact (hCG.1 hCG.2 this)
  have heE : e ∈ E(hM.restrict₂ hM') := hsub e heC
  have hfE : f ∈ E(hM.restrict₂ hM') := hsub f hfC
  have heGM : e ∈ E(G) := by
    have : e ∈ E(G ↾ (M ∆ M')) := by
      simpa [IsMatching.restrict₂] using heE
    exact this.1
  have hfGM : f ∈ E(G) := by
    have : f ∈ E(G ↾ (M ∆ M')) := by
      simpa [IsMatching.restrict₂] using hfE
    exact this.1
  have hdisjM := hM.disjoint heM hfM hnef
  have hdisjM' := hM'.disjoint heM' hfM' hnef
  have hVeq : V(G, e) = V(G, f) := by
    have hle : V(G, e) ⊆ V(G, f) := by
      intro x hx
      have : x ∈ V(G, f) := (hdisjM.le_bot ⟨hx, by
        have : x ∈ V(G, f) := hx
        exact this⟩).elim
      exact this
    have hle' : V(G, f) ⊆ V(G, e) := by
      intro x hx
      have : x ∈ V(G, e) := (hdisjM'.le_bot ⟨by
        have : x ∈ V(G, e) := hx
        exact this, hx⟩).elim
      exact this
    exact Set.Subset.antisymm hle hle'
  have : False := by
    have : Disjoint V(G, e) V(G, f) := hM.disjoint heM hfM hnef
    have : V(G, e) ⊆ ⊥ := by
      simpa [hVeq] using this.le_bot
    have : V(G, e) = ⊥ := by
      exact Set.eq_bot_iff.2 this
    have : e ∈ E(G) := heGM
    have : V(G, e).Nonempty := by
      rcases Graph.exists_mem_V_of_mem_E this with ⟨x, hx⟩
      exact ⟨x, hx⟩
    exact this.ne_empty (by simpa [this] )
  exact this

classical
  rw [disjoint_left]
  intro e heM heM'
  have heC : e ∈ E(C) := heM.1
  have heG : e ∈ E(G) := hM.subset heM.2
  have hmem : e ∈ M ∆ M' := by
    refine Or.inl ?_
    exact ⟨heM.2, by
      intro he'
      exact (hM'.disjoint heM' he' (by simpa)).le_bot ⟨by simpa using hC.edgeSet_incidence_nonempty heC,
        by simpa using hC.edgeSet_incidence_nonempty (by simpa using heC)⟩⟩
  have : e ∈ E(hM.restrict₂ hM') := by
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · exact ⟨heG, hmem⟩
    · intro hx
      exact (hC.noLoops (hCG.1.subset_edgeSet this) hx)
  have heC' : e ∈ E(hM.restrict₂ hM') := hCG.1.subset_edgeSet (by simpa using heC)
  exact (by
    have : False := by
      have : e ∈ (M ∆ M') := by
        have : e ∈ E(G ↾ (M ∆ M')) := heC'.1
        exact this.2
      exact this.elim (by
        intro h
        exact h heM')
    exact this.elim)

refine disjoint_left.2 ?_
  intro e heM heM'
  have heC : e ∈ E(C) := heM.1
  have heG : e ∈ E(G) := hM.subset heM.2
  have heCG : e ∈ E(hM.restrict₂ hM') := by
    exact hCG.1 ⟨heC, heG⟩
  have : e ∈ M ∆ M' := by
    simpa [IsMatching.restrict₂, Graph.loopRemove, Graph.edgeSet] using heCG
  exact (Set.not_mem_symmDiff_of_mem_left heM.2) this heM'.2
